name: Steel Maneuver
descriptionTemplate: When commanding armored units, damage dealt is increased by X%. After each attack, the unit restores HP equal to 10% of the damage dealt. While any buff is active, the armored units' critical hit chance increases by 10% and its attacks ignore 30% of the enemy’s defense. Units can move unimpeded by enemy blocking. If a target survives an attack, the unit may make one additional attack (once per turn).

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding armored units, damage dealt is increased by 7%. After each attack, the unit restores HP equal to 10% of the damage dealt. While any buff is active, the armored units' critical hit chance increases by 10% and its attacks ignore 30% of the enemy’s defense. Units can move unimpeded by enemy blocking. If a target survives an attack, the unit may make one additional attack (once per turn).
progression.renderedDescFr: Lorsque vous commandez des unités blindées, dégâts dealt is augmenté de 7%. Après chaque attaque, the unité restaure des PV équivalents à 10% des dégâts infligés. Tant qu'un bonus est actif, the unités blindées' chance de coup critique augmente de 10% and its attaques ignore 30% of the ennemi’s défense. Unités can se déplacer sans être bloqué par l'ennemi. Si une cible survit à une attaque, l'unité peut effectuer une attaque supplémentaire (once par tour).
